sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ تَعَلُّمُ مَبَادِئِ الْإِسْعَافَاتِ الْأَوَّلِيَّةِ مَهَارَةً حَيَوِيَّةً قَدْ تُنْقِذُ حَيَاةَ إِنْسَانٍ فِي اللَّحَظَاتِ الْحَرِجَةِ.
sentences.translation: Učenje principa prve pomoći smatra se vitalnom vještinom koja može spasiti ljudski život u kritičnim trenucima.
sentences.translationEn: Learning the principles of first aid is a vital skill that may save a person's life in critical moments.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَ حُدُوثِ حَرْقٍ بَسِيطٍ، يَجِبُ تَبْرِيدُ الْمِنْطَقَةِ الْمُصَابَةِ بِالْمَاءِ الْجَارِي لِتَخْفِيفِ الْأَلَمِ وَمَنْعِ التَّوَرُّمِ.
sentences.translation: Kada dođe do blage opekotine, zahvaćeno područje se mora ohladiti tekućom vodom kako bi se ublažio bol i spriječilo oticanje.
sentences.translationEn: When a minor burn occurs, the affected area must be cooled with running water to alleviate pain and prevent swelling.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ تَوَفُّرُ حَقِيبَةِ إِسْعَافَاتٍ فِي الْمَنْزِلِ لِلتَّعَامُلِ السَّرِيعِ مَعَ الْجُرُوحِ وَالْإِصَابَاتِ الطَّارِئَةِ.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je imati komplet prve pomoći kod kuće za brzu intervenciju kod rana i hitnih povreda.
sentences.translationEn: It is necessary to have a first aid kit at home for quick dealing with wounds and emergency injuries.

sentences.arabic: فِي حَالَةِ النَّزِيفِ الشَّدِيدِ، يَنْبَغِي الضَّغْطُ عَلَى مَكَانِ الْجُرْحِ حَتَّى تَصِلَ فِرَقُ الطَّوَارِئِ الطِّبِّيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: U slučaju jakog krvarenja, treba pritisnuti mjesto rane dok ne stignu ekipe hitne medicinske pomoći.
sentences.translationEn: In case of severe bleeding, pressure should be applied to the wound site until medical emergency teams arrive.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاهِمُ الدَّوْرَاتُ التَّدْرِيبِيَّةُ فِي مَنْحِ الْأَفْرَادِ الثِّقَةَ لِلتَّصَرُّفِ بِحِكْمَةٍ وَهُدُوءٍ أَثْنَاءَ الْأَزَمَاتِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Obuke doprinose davanju samopouzdanja pojedincima da postupaju mudro i smireno tokom zdravstvenih kriza.
sentences.translationEn: Training courses contribute to giving individuals the confidence to act wisely and calmly during health crises.
